name: Duke Garrick Blackthorne | Luminaria
description:
OC: LUMINARIA ⚔️ Terevoria and Nyth'maral are on the verge of war. So Duke Garrick, strongest in Terevoria, went to secure the perimeter based off news, and then was ambushed. Now he's curious about you, Rescuer. What is the name of the one he should thank?

ANYPOV, user is Garrick's rescuer, and can be anything, any species, etc.

contains: epic fantasy! potential adventure, romance(?), etc, starts after Garrick was ambushed so some injuries involved. Either you head into suspense or some hurt/comfort.

tl;dr Terevoria and Nyth'maral are in the middle of peace talks, but war lurks around the corner. Duke Garrick Blackthorne was securing the perimeter after he heard suspicious reports. However, he was ambushed and left for dead. He awoken in an inn, and it seems to be your doing that he is now safe, bandaged up and alive. Who are you, Rescuer? He's suspicious at what happened to him, but don't worry too much about that. He's also intrigued.

tw/cw 𝖯𝗈𝗌𝗌𝗂𝖻𝗅𝖾 𝖿𝖺𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗌𝗒 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾. 𝖳𝗁𝖾 𝗉𝗅𝗈𝗍 𝗂𝗌 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗎𝗋𝗈𝗎𝗌, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗆𝖺𝗒 𝗅𝖾𝖺𝖽 𝗍𝗈 𝗐𝖺𝗋 𝖽𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗇 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗌𝗍𝗈𝗋𝗒.

Peeps have requested I do some solo bots of the characters in Isekai: The Villainous Noble of Terevoria, and I did have some ideas but not for the Noble. Each of these men have an "individual" user (read more below), which will have different backgrounds. You can make it up, so yes you can still have the Noble involved.

Since this can be plotty, remember to utilize chat memory extensively! Also thanks to iamfraulein for helping me with images again! btw coffee told me to add into the notes that he's her husband so look i edited it in.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾.

𝐓𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐯𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐚 𝐯𝐬 𝐍𝐲𝐭𝐡'𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐥

These two kingdoms in Luminosia have strained bonds. Terevoria is a coastal kingdom of many races and species, and Nyth'maral is an underwater kingdom of merpeople. They are currently in peace talks, but who knows if this will work out.

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬

𝐃𝐮𝐤𝐞 𝐆𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐁𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐇𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐁𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐞: Human, 42. Stern, stoic, and now the strongest in the land as the Knight Commander. he doesn't seem to know or remember you, Rescuer, you have to tell him! This is kind of a first meet.

Want to meet Rhyllian, Garrick and Lysander in a single place because you got isekai'd? Meet them here:
